_comment: Copy to jarvos.config.json in your JARVOS_CLAWD_DIR (default: ~/clawd). All fields are optional — omit any you want to use the default for.

paths._vault_doc: Root of your Obsidian vault (or equivalent). Used as the base for journal and notes dirs when those are not set explicitly. Default: ~/Documents/Vault v3
paths._journal_doc: Where daily journal files are written. Default: $paths.vault/Journal. Override via JARVOS_JOURNAL_DIR env var.
paths._notes_doc: Where durable notes are written. Default: $paths.vault/Notes. Override via JARVOS_NOTES_DIR env var.
paths._tags_doc: Tags directory (used by journal-module config). Default: $paths.vault/Tags.

_env_vars._doc: Environment variables take precedence over this file. Canonical names (JARVOS_*) are checked first, then legacy aliases.
_env_vars.JARVOS_CLAWD_DIR: Clawd/workspace root (where this config lives) — default: ~/clawd
